queries.sql: SELECT histogram(_timestamp) AS _time, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY _time ORDER BY _time

SELECT histogram(_timestamp) AS _time, COUNT(CASE WHEN load_factor > 50.0 THEN 1 END) AS high_load_cnt, COUNT(CASE WHEN load_factor <= 50.0 THEN 1 END) AS low_load_cnt FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY _time ORDER BY _time ASC

expected.note: Histogram with conditional COUNT using CASE

queries.sql: SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '1 minute') AS bucket_time, facility_zone, COUNT(*) AS zone_events, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate), 2) AS avg_tput FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY bucket_time, facility_zone ORDER BY bucket_time ASC, facility_zone ASC

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '30 seconds') AS bucket, COUNT(*) AS cnt, SUM(item_count) AS items, ROUND(AVG(cell_temp), 2) AS avg_temp, ROUND(AVG(charge_remaining), 2) AS avg_charge FROM "{stream}" WHERE operation_mode != 'manual' GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket ASC

expected.note: 30-second histogram with 4 aggregates, filtered by operation_mode

queries.sql: SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '2 minutes') AS time_window, operation_mode, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE load_factor > 50.0) AS high_load_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE load_factor <= 50.0) AS low_load_count, COUNT(*) AS total FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY time_window, operation_mode ORDER BY time_window ASC, operation_mode ASC

expected.note: 2-minute histogram + mode breakdown with FILTER clauses

queries.sql: SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '5 minutes') AS block, sorter_model, COUNT(*) AS samples, ROUND(MIN(throughput_rate), 2) AS floor_tput, ROUND(MAX(throughput_rate), 2) AS ceiling_tput FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY block, sorter_model HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2 ORDER BY block ASC, ceiling_tput DESC

expected.note: 5-minute histogram with MIN/MAX and HAVING filter

queries.sql: SELECT histogram(_timestamp) AS time_slot, control_center, COUNT(*) AS events, ROUND(SUM(package_size) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS avg_pkg FROM "{stream}" WHERE package_size >= 250 GROUP BY time_slot, control_center ORDER BY time_slot ASC, events DESC

expected.note: Auto-interval histogram + control_center breakdown with package filter

queries.sql: SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '1 minute') AS minute_slot, COUNT(*) AS total_events, COUNT(DISTINCT pallet_id) AS distinct_pallets, COUNT(DISTINCT conveyor_lane) AS distinct_lanes FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY minute_slot ORDER BY minute_slot ASC

expected.note: 1-minute histogram with COUNT DISTINCT on two columns

queries.sql: SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '3 minutes') AS interval_bucket, conveyor_lane, operation_mode, COUNT(*) AS cnt, ROUND(AVG(scan_attempts), 2) AS avg_scan FROM "{stream}" WHERE scan_attempts >= 1 GROUP BY interval_bucket, conveyor_lane, operation_mode ORDER BY interval_bucket ASC, cnt DESC

expected.note: 3-minute histogram with 3-field GROUP BY (bucket + lane + mode)

queries.sql: SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '4 minutes') AS window_block, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE charge_remaining >= 60.0) AS charged_ops, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE charge_remaining < 30.0) AS low_charge_ops, ROUND(AVG(cell_temp) FILTER (WHERE charge_remaining < 30.0), 2) AS low_charge_avg_temp FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY window_block ORDER BY window_block ASC

expected.note: 4-minute histogram with conditional FILTER aggregates and filtered AVG

queries.sql: SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '15 seconds') AS fine_bucket, COUNT(*) AS total, ROUND(AVG(defect_limit), 3) AS avg_defect, ROUND(STDDEV(throughput_rate), 2) AS tput_volatility FROM "{stream}" WHERE defect_limit IS NOT NULL AND throughput_rate IS NOT NULL GROUP BY fine_bucket HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY fine_bucket ASC

expected.note: 15-second fine histogram with STDDEV and HAVING
